'''Brian Bascle''' was a voice actor who voiced [[Kyle Katarn]] in ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''; he was also credited as the voice of [[Rebel trooper]]s and [[TIE/sa bomber|TIE Bomber]] [[TIE pilot|pilots]], as well as providing additional voice work for background characters. Bascale has been a voice actor since 2001, though he has also appeared in live-action media; his most famous roles outside of ''Star Wars'' include an appearance in the movie ''What to Expect When You're Expecting'' and the Aretha Franklin biopic ''Respect''.
